item.title: 我73岁仍全职工作，能否免缴社保税？
item.description:

item.description:
Alibaba just had its best day in 10 months. Is it time for China techs to catch up?

item.description:

item.title: GitLost：我们欺骗了GitHub的AI代理并窃取了私有仓库
item.description:

Security researchers successfully tricked GitHub's AI agent, exposing a vulnerability that led to unauthorized access to private repositories. This highlights risks in AI-integrated development platforms.

item.description:

item.description:

Typhoons have caused severe flooding and rare tornadoes across parts of China, leaving families stranded. Local residents are reporting difficulties in accessing food and emergency assistance.

item.description:
Meta’s new Muse Image model can pull other Instagram users into AI photos

Meta's new Muse Image model, developed by its Superintelligence Labs, allows users to integrate people into AI-generated photos. The tool is being rolled out across Meta's app ecosystem.

item.description:

Tags: quantum · algorithm · encryption

item.title: 时间是否来自整个宇宙的计算运行？
item.description:

Tags: physics · time · computation

随着数字游戏发行成为主流，索尼位于奥地利的光盘工厂正面临转型。此举标志着游戏产业对实体光盘需求的持续下滑。

item.title: 加拿大北极地区的动人照片获得《新科学家》编辑奖
item.description:
Evocative photos of Canadian Arctic win New Scientist Editors Award

Photographer Natalya Saprunova won the New Scientist Editors Award for her work documenting climate change impacts in the Canadian Arctic. Her photos highlight coastal erosion and permafrost degradation.

摄影师 Natalya Saprunova 凭借记录加拿大北极地区气候变化影响的作品获得《新科学家》编辑奖。照片生动展现了海岸侵蚀和永久冻土消融现象。

item.description:

Physicists are exploring a non-quantum theory of space-time involving random wobbles in time. This could offer a breakthrough in understanding the interaction between gravity and the quantum world.

item.description:
Why California’s carbon manure math doesn’t add up

California's climate policy pays cattle farmers to convert methane from manure into natural gas, a practice critics argue is environmentally counterproductive. The system faces scrutiny for failing to properly account for emissions.
